runners.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 4.5 lengths over 515m at this track in a handy 29.50, beating Buckle Up Taja. Well suited by the draw. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame latest (29.95) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Has never missed the placings from three starts off this box. Looks a leading chance.

runners.formComment: Was edged out last time at Hobart when beaten just a nose but did clock a solid 25.92 over the 461m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 4 lengths over 340m at Hobart in a handy (19.47), beating Myall Clyde. Will find this a bit tougher, in form but prepared to risk this time.

runners.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at Hobart over 461m. The start prior was at her best with a 2.25 lengths win over 278m at this track. Solid claims this line-up.
